title: 04757_Self-Interpretable_Time_Series_Prediction_with_Counterfactual_Explanations
positive_examples: Improves interpretability of time series predictions in safety-critical areas such as healthcare and autonomous driving.
Generates actionable counterfactual explanations that help users understand how to achieve desired outcomes in predictions.
negative_examples: Counterfactual explanations may suggest changes to immutable variables (e.g., age, gender) that are infeasible and could lead to misunderstandings.
The reliance on deep learning models may introduce biases if the underlying data is biased, potentially affecting decision-making in critical areas.
